calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-15-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Establish Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARK C. LECLERC, Esq. of Le Clerc & Le Clerc, LLP (Tel: 415-445-0900) for Plaintiff Jennifer Chow;
Atty. HEIDI G. KIM, Esq. of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C. (Tel: 415-442-4810) for Defendant
Helpshift, Inc.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Jennifer Chow's Motion To Establish Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Counsel for parties inform the Court that Defendant did provide a verification as to Requests 4, 6, 8, 9, and 11.

Matter is submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to establish admissions is denied as to Requests Nos. 1-3, 5, 7, 10, 12 and 13. The motion is denied as to Requests Nos. 4, 6, 8, 9 and 11, on the condition that Helpshift has served code-compliant verifications as to all of its RFA responses prior to the February 3 hearing date. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $1,360.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Motion To Establish Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Continued To Feb-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CHRISTOPHER R. LECLERC, Esq. of Le Clerc & Le Clerc, LLP (Tel: 415-445-0900) for Plaintiff Jennifer Chow;
Attys. HEIDI G. KIM, Esq. and CHARLES L. THOMPSON, IV, Esq. of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C. (Tel: 415-442-4810) for Defendant Helpshift, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JENNIFER CHOW's Motion To Establish Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem.

Matter discussed.

Matter is continued to February 3, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Judge Pro Tem to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
